title: Complete the Rain Song
prompt: Fill in the missing words to complete the 'Rain, rain, go away' song.
hint: Listen carefully to the repeated phrases and fill in the blanks.
sample: Rain, rain, go away, Come again another day, little one, wants to play.

ja.prompt: 「Rain, rain, go away」の歌詞の欠けている言葉を埋めてください。
ja.hint: 繰り返されるフレーズをよく聞いて空欄を埋めましょう。
ja.sample: Rain, rain, go away, Come again another day, little one, wants to play.

zh.prompt: 填寫缺少的單詞，完成「Rain, rain, go away」這首歌。
zh.hint: 仔細聽反覆出現的片語並填入空格。
zh.sample: Rain, rain, go away, Come again another day, little one, wants to play.

title: Identify the Repeated Phrase
prompt: Identify and write down the phrase that is repeated multiple times in the song.
hint: Focus on the lines that start with 'Come again another day'.
sample: Come again another day, rain, rain, go away.

ja.prompt: 歌の中で何度も繰り返されるフレーズを書き出してください。
ja.hint: 'Come again another day'で始まる行に注目しましょう。
ja.sample: Come again another day, rain, rain, go away.

zh.prompt: 找出並寫出歌中多次重複出現的片語。
zh.hint: 注意以「Come again another day」開頭的句子。
zh.sample: Come again another day, rain, rain, go away.

title: Count the Number of Times 'Once' Appears
prompt: How many times does the word 'once' appear in the song? Write the number.
hint: Listen carefully to each line and count the word 'once'.

ja.prompt: 歌の中で「once」という単語は何回出てきますか？数字で答えてください。
ja.hint: 各行をよく聞いて「once」の回数を数えましょう。

zh.prompt: 歌中「once」這個字出現了幾次？請寫出數字。
zh.hint: 仔細聽每一句並數出「once」的次數。
